candidate_descriptions.current: Current aft_search fused order from semantic_search(top_k=wide_top_k).
candidate_descriptions.exact_identifier_first: Bench-only identifier guardrail: exact-match files sort before non-exact files for identifier-shaped queries.
candidate_descriptions.identifier_lexical_uncapped: Bench-only simulation of removing the 0.25 lexical-only ceiling for identifier/path/error-code queries.
candidate_descriptions.rrf_exact_lane: Bench-only reciprocal-rank fusion over reconstructed semantic ranks and an exact-match lexical lane.
